records.question: Which documents named Review on French files dated on 1980-10-22 14:17:11 are related to the Population Research project, have a CV type with an excellent description, include government expense details, and belong to an Open Project statement?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN projects ON documents.project_id = projects.project_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN statements ON documents.document_id = statements.statement_id
JOIN documents_with_expenses ON documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'excellent' AND documents_with_expenses.document_details = 'government' AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'CV' AND projects.project_details = 'Population Research project' AND documents.document_date = '1980-10-22 14:17:11' AND documents.document_name = 'Review on French files' AND statements.statement_details = 'Open Project'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT d.document_id
FROM Documents d
JOIN Projects p ON d.project_id = p.project_id
JOIN Ref_Document_Types rdt ON d.document_type_code = rdt.document_type_code
JOIN Statements s ON d.document_id = s.statement_id
JOIN Documents_with_Expenses dwe ON d.document_id = dwe.document_id
WHERE d.document_date = '1980-10-22 14:17:11'
  AND d.document_name = 'Review on French files'
  AND p.project_details = 'Population Research project'
  AND rdt.document_type_description = 'excellent'
  AND rdt.document_type_name = 'CV'
  AND s.statement_details = 'Open Project'
  AND dwe.document_details = 'government'

records.question: What documents named Winona Book have a document date on or after 1971-06-09 19:03:41?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
WHERE documents.document_date >= '1971-06-09 19:03:41' AND documents.document_name = 'Winona Book'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT document_id
FROM Documents
WHERE document_date >= '1971-06-09 19:03:41'
AND document_name = 'Winona Book'

records.question: Which documents named Review on USA files are books described as excellent and dated on or before 1981-11-29 10:23:01?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE documents.document_date <= '1981-11-29 10:23:01' AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Book' AND documents.document_name = 'Review on USA files' AND ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'excellent'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id
FROM Documents
JOIN Ref_Document_Types ON Documents.document_type_code = Ref_Document_Types.Document_Type_Code
WHERE Documents.document_date <= '1981-11-29 10:23:01'
AND Documents.document_name = 'Review on USA files'
AND Ref_Document_Types.Document_Type_Name = 'Book'
AND Ref_Document_Types.Document_Type_Description = 'excellent'

records.question: Which documents named Review on UK files are linked to projects and have associated expenses?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN projects ON documents.project_id = projects.project_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN documents_with_expenses ON documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
WHERE documents.document_name = 'Review on UK files'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id
FROM Documents
INNER JOIN Projects ON Documents.project_id = Projects.project_id
INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Types ON Documents.document_type_code = Ref_Document_Types.document_type_code
INNER JOIN Documents_with_Expenses ON Documents.document_id = Documents_with_Expenses.document_id
WHERE Documents.document_name = 'Review on UK files'

records.question: What documents named Chapter on private files are classified as Paper?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE documents.document_name = 'Chapter on private files' AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Paper'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT d.document_id
FROM Documents d
JOIN Ref_Document_Types rdt ON d.document_type_code = rdt.document_type_code
WHERE d.document_name = 'Chapter on private files'
AND rdt.document_type_name = 'Paper'

records.question: Which Paper documents named Book on USA files, related to Private Project statements and government expenses, were created on or before 2013-01-26 15:15:25?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN statements ON documents.document_id = statements.statement_id
JOIN documents_with_expenses ON documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
WHERE statements.statement_details = 'Private Project' AND documents.document_name = 'Book on USA files' AND documents_with_expenses.document_details = 'government' AND documents.document_date <= '2013-01-26 15:15:25' AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Paper'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT d.document_id
FROM Documents d
INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Types rdt ON d.document_type_code = rdt.document_type_code
INNER JOIN Statements s ON d.document_id = s.statement_id
INNER JOIN Documents_with_Expenses dw ON d.document_id = dw.document_id
WHERE d.document_name = 'Book on USA files'
AND d.document_date <= '2013-01-26 15:15:25'
AND rdt.document_type_name = 'Paper'
AND s.statement_details = 'Private Project'
AND dw.document_details = 'government'

records.question: Which documents have related projects, reference document types with document type description exactly 'good' and document type name exactly 'Paper', statements, and documents with expenses?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN projects ON documents.project_id = projects.project_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN statements ON documents.document_id = statements.statement_id
JOIN documents_with_expenses ON documents.document_id = documents_with_expenses.document_id
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'good' AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Paper'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT 
    d.Document_ID
FROM 
    Documents d
INNER JOIN 
    Projects p ON d.Project_ID = p.Project_ID
INNER JOIN 
    Ref_Document_Types rdt ON d.Document_Type_Code = rdt.Document_Type_Code
    AND rdt.Document_Type_Description = 'good'
    AND rdt.Document_Type_Name = 'Paper'
INNER JOIN 
    Statements s ON d.Document_ID = s.Statement_ID
INNER JOIN 
    Documents_with_Expenses dwe ON d.Document_ID = dwe.Document_ID

records.question: Which documents are Books with a document type description that is excellent?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN projects ON documents.project_id = projects.project_id
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'excellent' AND ref_document_types.document_type_name = 'Book'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT D.Document_ID
FROM Documents D
INNER JOIN Projects P ON D.Project_ID = P.Project_ID
INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Types RDT ON D.Document_Type_Code = RDT.Document_Type_Code
WHERE RDT.Document_Type_Description = 'excellent'
AND RDT.Document_Type_Name = 'Book'
